overview: Launchify grounded 4 captured product actions for Internal QA, turned them into synchronized steps, and prepared captions, zooms, and highlights from the event-backed guide.

scenes.visual_summary: Spotlight the real UI action around Google Login and keep surrounding context subdued. Editorial planning emphasized a stable result frame and reduced overlay noise.
